stimulus: Edwidge Danticat’s 2007 memoir Brother, I’m Dying, an account of the deaths of her father and her uncle Joseph ______blank offers readers a personal entry point into the broader history of Haitian migration to the United States during the twentieth century.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is the best answer. The comma after "Dantica" pairs with the comma after "Dying" to enclose the supplementary appositive "an account of the deaths of her father and her uncle Joseph Dantica." Removing the insertion leaves a grammatical sentence.

Choice B is incorrect because it fails to close the supplementary element and inserts a conjunction that does not belong. Choice C is incorrect because adding the conjunction "and" treats the appositive as part of a coordinated structure rather than a parenthetical insertion. Choice D is incorrect because omitting punctuation fails to close the supplementary element opened by the comma after "Dying."
